name: Hot Weather Punch
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the orange juice and lemonade concentrates into a 2 1/2 to 3 quart pitcher.
2. Add the water, apricot nectar, and pineapple juice to the pitcher.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Chill before serving. Makes about 2 1/2 quarts.
